description: Shadow the new Exa and procurement execution paths against current behavior with production-like budgets and a small allowlisted source/program cohort. Compare yield, precision, cost, latency, failures, and operator workload; prevent autonomous promotion or external side effects during shadowing. Acceptance: predefined thresholds pass for multiple runs and rollback/disable controls are exercised before widening traffic.
title: Run acquisition canary and shadow rollout
